outbound.choose:
<when condition="@("{{aforo-mcp-enabled}}" == "true" &&
                              context.Request.Method == "POST" &&
                              context.Request.Body != null &&
                              context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true).Contains("tools/call"))">
                
                    {{aforo-endpoint}}
                    POST
                    
                        application/json
                    
                    
                        Bearer {{aforo-api-key}}
                    
                    
                        {{aforo-tenant-id}}
                    
                    @{
                        var reqBody = context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                        var toolName = "unknown";
                        var agentId = "";

                        if (reqBody != null && reqBody["method"]?.ToString() == "tools/call") {
                            var paramz = reqBody["params"] as JObject;
                            if (paramz != null) {
                                toolName = paramz["name"]?.ToString() ?? "unknown";
                                var meta = paramz["_meta"] as JObject;
                                if (meta != null) {
                                    agentId = meta["agent_id"]?.ToString() ?? "";
                                }
                            }
                        }

                        var sessionId = context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Mcp-Session-Id", "");
                        var path = context.Request.Url.Path;
                        var method = context.Request.Method;
                        var statusCode = context.Response.StatusCode;
                        var latencyMs = (int)context.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds;

                        var evt = new JObject(
                            new JProperty("events", new JArray(
                                new JObject(
                                    new JProperty("customerId",
                                        context.Subscription != null ? context.Subscription.Id : "unknown"),
                                    new JProperty("metricName", "mcp_server.tool_invocations"),
                                    new JProperty("quantity", 1),
                                    new JProperty("idempotencyKey",
                                        "mcp:" + context.RequestId + ":" + toolName + ":" +
                                        DateTime.UtcNow.Ticks),
                                    new JProperty("occurredAt", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")),
                                    new JProperty("productType", "MCP_SERVER"),
                                    new JProperty("toolName", toolName),
                                    new JProperty("agentId", agentId),
                                    new JProperty("sessionId", sessionId),
                                    new JProperty("executionStatus",
                                        statusCode >= 200 && statusCode < 300 ? "SUCCESS" : "ERROR"),
                                    new JProperty("executionDurationMs", latencyMs),
                                    new JProperty("endpointPath", path),
                                    new JProperty("httpMethod", method),
                                    new JProperty("statusCode", statusCode),
                                    new JProperty("responseTimeMs", latencyMs),
                                    new JProperty("trace", new JObject(
                                        new JProperty("traceparent", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("traceparent", null)),
                                        new JProperty("tracestate", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("tracestate", null)),
                                        new JProperty("xTraceId", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-trace-id", null)),
                                        new JProperty("xRequestId", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-request-id", null))
                                    )),
                                    new JProperty("metadata", new JObject(
                                        new JProperty("gateway", "azure-apim"),
                                        new JProperty("productId", "{{aforo-mcp-product-id}}")
                                    ))
                                )
                            ))
                        );
                        return evt.ToString();
                    }
                
            
            
                
                
                    {{aforo-endpoint}}
                    POST
                    
                        application/json
                    
                    
                        Bearer {{aforo-api-key}}
                    
                    
                        {{aforo-tenant-id}}
                    
                    @{
                        var path = context.Request.Url.Path;
                        var method = context.Request.Method;
                        var statusCode = context.Response.StatusCode;
                        var latencyMs = (int)context.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds;

                        var evt = new JObject(
                            new JProperty("events", new JArray(
                                new JObject(
                                    new JProperty("customerId",
                                        context.Subscription != null ? context.Subscription.Id : "unknown"),
                                    new JProperty("metricName", method + " " + path),
                                    new JProperty("quantity", 1),
                                    new JProperty("idempotencyKey",
                                        context.RequestId + ":" + DateTime.UtcNow.Ticks),
                                    new JProperty("occurredAt", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")),
                                    new JProperty("endpointPath", path),
                                    new JProperty("httpMethod", method),
                                    new JProperty("statusCode", statusCode),
                                    new JProperty("responseTimeMs", latencyMs),
                                    new JProperty("trace", new JObject(
                                        new JProperty("traceparent", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("traceparent", null)),
                                        new JProperty("tracestate", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("tracestate", null)),
                                        new JProperty("xTraceId", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-trace-id", null)),
                                        new JProperty("xRequestId", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-request-id", null))
                                    )),
                                    new JProperty("metadata", new JObject(
                                        new JProperty("gateway", "azure-apim"),
                                        new JProperty("method", method),
                                        new JProperty("path", path),
                                        new JProperty("status", statusCode),
                                        new JProperty("latency", latencyMs)
                                    ))
                                )
                            ))
                        );
                        return evt.ToString();
                    }
